title: Mortgage Application Drop-Off Spike at Step 4
description: Mortgage application completions dropped 41% at Step 4 — income verification. This started 72 hours ago and correlates with a document upload exception in the UiPath automation workflow. 847 members were affected this week.

title: Auto Loan Inquiry Abandonment — 3x Increase
description: Einstein's predictive model is flagging a 3x increase in auto loan inquiry abandonment. The model associates this with rate perception — members are comparing and leaving. Genesys transcript analysis confirms 'rate' appears in 68% of abandonment-adjacent calls this week.

title: CD Complaint Cluster — Military Retirees
description: A complaint cluster is forming around CD rate transparency. 214 Genesys interactions flagged in the last 5 days. This segment skews toward military retirees — your highest-tenure members and your strongest NPS drivers.
